summary: Comprehensive testing of BookYourSalons platform - All core APIs and frontend pages are working correctly. Successfully tested new features including trending salons, smart search, user analytics, spam protection, salon status control, and operating hours management.
passed_tests: Root API endpoint (/api/) returns correct message
Trending salons API (/api/salons/trending) returns valid array
Smart search API (/api/search) works with query parameters
Admin user analytics API (/api/admin/user-analytics) returns analytics data
Spam protection API (/api/booking/check-spam) validates customer requests
Salon status toggle API (/api/salon/{id}/toggle-status) accepts requests
Salon operating hours API (/api/salon/{id}/hours) accepts time updates
Review creation API (/api/review/create) accepts review submissions
Salon dashboard analytics API (/api/salon/{id}/dashboard-analytics) returns analytics
Landing page loads correctly with proper navigation
Frontend can access backend APIs successfully
